description: A minimal HTTP server script used for preview readiness in a containerized environment. It provides health check endpoints and a basic status response to signal that the container is ready.

classes.name: Handler
classes.description: HTTP request handler for health and status endpoints, extends BaseHTTPRequestHandler.

methods.name: None _send_json(self, status_code: int, payload: dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Send a JSON response with specified status code.

methods.name: None _send_text(self, status_code: int, text: str)
methods.description: Send a plain text response with specified status code.

methods.name: None do_GET(self)
methods.description: Handle GET requests, providing health, readiness, or default info responses.

methods.name: None log_message(self, format: str, *args: object)
methods.description: Override to suppress default logging for cleaner preview output.

methods.name: None main()
methods.description: Initialize and start the HTTP server on configured host and port.

ctags.name: _send_json
ctags.pattern: /^    def _send_json(self, status_code: int, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> None:$/

ctags.name: _send_text
ctags.pattern: /^    def _send_text(self, status_code: int, text: str) -> None:$/

ctags.name: do_GET
ctags.pattern: /^    def do_GET(self) -> None:  # noqa: N802 (BaseHTTPRequestHandler naming)$/

ctags.name: log_message
ctags.pattern: /^    def log_message(self, format: str, *args: object) -> None:$/
